LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mark_IV.descripti: An advanced iteration of the Pip-Boy 3000, the Mark IV features enhanced processing power and a more refined interface. Its improved data management systems provide better work coordination and faster information processing. The Mark IV was considered top-of-the-line before the war. This model offers superior performance compared to earlier versions, with enhanced computational capabilities.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mark_IV.label: Pip-Boy 3000 mark IV
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mk_I.description: The Pip-Boy 3000 model was the most common personal information processor issued to Vault dwellers before the war. This rugged wrist-mounted computer features a monochrome green display and provides essential data management capabilities. Its simple but reliable interface assists with work coordination and task management. This is the classic model known for its durability and ease of use.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Pipboy3000_Mk_I.label: Pip-Boy 3000
